title: The Man at the Bus Stop
content: Every morning, commuters noticed an elderly man waiting patiently at the same bus stop, yet nobody ever saw him board a bus. Weeks passed before someone finally asked why he came there each day. The man smiled and explained that he was waiting for his granddaughter after school. He enjoyed arriving early because it gave him time to read the newspaper and greet familiar faces from the neighborhood. The mystery disappeared, replaced by admiration for his quiet routine and dedication to his family.
